kayak

Mokulua Islands Kayak Adventure

5 hours • Kailua Beach, Oahu • moderate difficulty

Book Now — $149

Ready to Book?

Select your date and reserve your spot. Tours fill up fast — especially during peak season.

Loading booking calendar...

Quick Facts

Duration
5 hours
Difficulty
moderate
Location
Kailua Beach, Oahu
Price
$149 per person
Group Size
2–10 guests

Highlights

  • Paddle to the iconic Mokulua Islands off Kailua Beach
  • Explore seabird sanctuary and tide pools
  • Snorkel with Hawaiian green sea turtles
  • Panoramic views of the Ko'olau Mountains

What's Included

  • Premium sit-on-top kayak
  • PFD (life jacket) and paddle
  • Snorkel gear (mask, fins, snorkel)
  • Dry bag for personal items
  • Professional guide (CPR/First Aid certified)
  • Light snacks and water

What to Bring

  • → Reef-safe sunscreen
  • → Swimsuit and rash guard
  • → Water shoes or sandals
  • → Hat and sunglasses
  • → Reusable water bottle

Frequently Asked Questions

No prior experience needed! Our guides provide a full safety briefing and paddling instruction before launch. The route is suitable for beginners in moderate physical condition.
Safety is our top priority. If wind or swell conditions are unsafe, we'll reschedule at no charge or provide a full refund.
Yes, children 8+ can paddle in a tandem kayak with an adult. Kids under 12 must be accompanied by a parent.

Ready to Experience Mokulua Islands Kayak Adventure?

Reserve your spot today. Limited availability — book now to secure your date.

Book Now — $149

🌊 Active Oahu Tours

Guided kayak, e-bike, and outdoor adventures on Oahu's stunning windward coast. Experience the real Hawaii with local guides who call these waters home.
